name: stacked-pie
description: Multi-layer nested pie chart with concentric rings for comparing data sets

data.name: data
data.description: Array of configurations for each concentric ring. Example: [{name: 'Q1-Q2', radius: ['0%', '35%'], data: [{value: 200, name: 'Desktop'}]}]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
